title: PairCsrRequest
description: Request body for POST /api/pair/claim — CSR + ECDH pub + HMAC + nonce + client label

csr.description: PEM-encoded Certificate Signing Request per RFC 2986. ECDSA P-256 key.

ecdh_pub.description: Base64-encoded compressed X25519 public key (32 bytes raw = 44 chars b64)

hmac.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 over csr || ecdh_pub || nonce. Shared secret derived from operator's pre-shared armed-mode passcode (out-of-band) OR ECDH-derived from a discoverable bridge identity (default).

nonce.description: Base64-encoded 16-byte random nonce (anti-replay). Bridge tracks nonces seen during current arm window.

client_label.description: Operator-visible name for this client (rendered in touch UI confirmation per REQ-016)
